Title: My Remote version 25.9.5.9483 updated on machine Kevin-Maahs,Matyas,MattW,RyansWin11
Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine Kevin-Maahs,Matyas,MattW,RyansWin11
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.5.9483. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

Notes:

.' I forwarded the email to Ryan with all the details and advised protecting the file with a password.

Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.32.20403.0)updated on machines KEVIN-MAAHS,KEVINT,MATTW,MATYAS
Notes:
Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines KEVIN-MAAHS,KEVINT,MATTW,MATYAS
running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version  and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.32.20403.0
of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

Title: Huntress Agent updated for the clients
Notes:
Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on SAS client  is old version, also the devices had been offline for more than 30 days.

Deleted the application and rescanned the application on the portal. Rest all the system are healthy.
